overview: The Pensieve TM Filter implements the `IFilter` interface for Pensieve translation memories. It allows using a Pensieve TM as an input or output document, similar to other translatable document formats such as TMX, PO, etc.
processingNotes: The filter always uses its internal encoding — any user-specified encoding setting is ignored.
limitations: Since Pensieve TM content is binary, the `setOutput(OutputStream output)` method of `PensieveFilterWriter` is not implemented. You cannot output Pensieve TM content to other stream types without going through a format conversion.
